inputs.label: Stock Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of raw material available for cutting.

inputs.label: Part Length
inputs.businessContext: Desired length of each cut piece.

inputs.label: Kerf Width
inputs.businessContext: Material removed by the cutting process (e.g., blade thickness, laser kerf).

inputs.label: End Trim
inputs.businessContext: Additional trim from each end of the stock to ensure squareness. Deducted from usable length.

inputs.label: Required Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Total number of pieces needed. If >0, calculates the number of stocks and total material required. Set to 0 for single-stock optimization only.
